title: Spicy Korean Chicken Tacos
description: A spicy and crunchy Korean dish featuring hard taco shells and high protein chicken, perfect for a quick fix meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together gochujang, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger to make the marinade.
Add the chicken to the marinade and toss to coat, letting it marinate for at least 10 minutes.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned and cooked through.
Warm the taco shells according to package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by placing cooked chicken into the shells, followed by a spoonful of slaw and a sprinkle of cilantro.
Serve immediately with lime wedges on the side.
Prepare the tadka by heating a small amount of oil in a pan over medium heat and adding a pinch of red pepper flakes.
Drizzle the tadka over the tacos for an extra spicy kick.
Garnish with additional cilantro and serve.
